Section 734, , , related to extension of streets or alleys across Indian or Eskimo land in Alaska. Section was formerly classified to .act May 25, 1926, ch. 379, § 244 Stat. 630section 355b of Title 48
Section 735, , , related to a survey of nonmineral public lands in Alaska into lots and blocks. Section was formerly classified to .act May 25, 1926, ch. 379, § 344 Stat. 630section 355c of Title 48

Section 736, , , related to authority of Secretary to prescribe regulations for sections 733 to 735 of this title. Section was formerly classified to .act May 25, 1926, ch. 379, § 444 Stat. 630section 355d of Title 48
Effective Date of Repeal, , , provided that the repeal made by section 703(a) is effective on and after .Pub. L. 94–579, title VII, § 703(a)90 Stat. 2789Oct. 21, 1976Oct. 21, 1976

Juneau Indian Village Townsite, , , which provided that sections 733 to 736 of this title were extended and made applicable to all lands of the Juneau Indian Village of Alaska, including uplands and filled in tidelands occupied on , was repealed by .Pub.
